title: It's Halloween, You 'Fraidy Mouse!
titleZh: 万圣节快乐，胆小鬼老鼠！
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must write a Halloween book in just one day while his spooky family and a crypt-loving mouse make him jump with fright! 🎃

q.en: Who is the mouse telling this story?
q.zh: 这个故事是由哪只老鼠讲述的？

explain.en: The book begins with 'My name is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton,' and he is the narrator throughout.
explain.zh: 书一开头就写道“我的名字是斯蒂顿，杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿”，而且整本书都由他来讲述。

options.en: A Halloween costume store according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一家万圣节服装店（按书中另一种说法）
杰罗尼摩出版的一份报纸

explain.en: Geronimo says he is a writer and the publisher of The Rodent's Gazette, the best newspaper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说自己是作家，也是《老鼠日报》的出版人，那是老鼠岛上最好的报纸。

q.en: Who scares Geronimo in his office with a skull, fake blood, and a skeleton costume?
q.zh: 是谁在办公室里用骷髅、假血和骷髅骨架服装吓唬杰罗尼摩？

explain.en: Trap admits it was him in a skeleton costume saying 'Trick or treat?' and rates his own scary tricks.
explain.zh: 特拉普承认是自己穿着骷髅骨架服装说“不给糖就捣蛋？”，还给自己设计的吓人把戏打分。

q.en: Who tells Geronimo he must write a Halloween book in just twenty-four hours?
q.zh: 是谁要求杰罗尼摩必须在二十四小时内写出一本万圣节的书？

explain.en: Thea comes to his mouse hole and declares that, as a writer, he must write the Halloween book fast.
explain.zh: 茜亚来到他的老鼠洞，说身为作家的他必须赶快把这本万圣节的书写出来。

q.en: Where does Cousin Trap work while testing Halloween tricks?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普在哪儿一边测试万圣节把戏一边工作？

options.en: At The Rodent's Gazette according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在《老鼠日报》社（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: At a store called Tricks for Tails
options.zh: 一家名叫“尾巴魔术”的商店

explain.en: Trap works with his friend Paws Prankster at Tricks for Tails, a store full of gag gifts and practical jokes.
explain.zh: 特拉普和朋友爪子·恶作剧在“尾巴魔术”店工作，那是一家满是搞笑礼物和恶作剧道具的商店。

q.zh: 克里普拉·冯·卡克佛是谁？

options.en: A mouse who lives in a tomb and has a crush on Geronimo
options.zh: 一只住在墓穴里、还喜欢杰罗尼摩的老鼠

options.en: The night watchmouse at the office according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 办公室里的守夜老鼠（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A famous chef in New Mouse City
options.zh: 新鼠城一位有名的厨师

explain.en: Creepella lives at 33 Dark Grave Drive in a tomb and Benjamin says she has a crush on Geronimo.
explain.zh: 克里普拉住在暗坟道33号的一座墓穴里，本杰明还说她喜欢上了杰罗尼摩。

q.en: Who cooks the scary-looking Halloween meal for the party?
q.zh: 是谁为派对做了那些看起来很吓人的万圣节大餐？

options.en: Chef Saucy Le Paws according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 厨师索西·勒波（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo calls Tina Spicytail, his grandfather William Shortpaws's cook, and she makes the whole menu.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩打电话给爷爷威廉·短爪的厨师蒂娜·辣尾，整桌菜都是她做的。

q.en: In the Halloween book, what are 'Slippery Sewer Slugs' really made of?
q.zh: 在万圣节的书里，“滑溜溜的下水道蛞蝓”其实是用什么做的？

explain.en: Geronimo explains to Tina that sewer slugs are really just penne pasta, and bats' eyes are cherry tomatoes.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩向蒂娜解释，下水道蛞蝓其实就是笔管面，蝙蝠眼睛则是樱桃番茄。

q.en: Where does Creepella hold the Halloween party on October 31?
q.zh: 十月三十一日，克里普拉把万圣节派对办在哪里？

explain.en: Creepella says 'We'll have a Halloween party here at my crypt!' and the guests arrive there on Halloween night.
explain.zh: 克里普拉说“我们就在我的墓穴里办万圣节派对吧！”，宾客们果然在万圣节夜晚来到那里。

q.en: How does Geronimo finally escape from Creepella at the end?
q.zh: 最后杰罗尼摩是如何从克里普拉身边脱身的？

options.en: He hides inside a coffin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他躲进一口棺材里（按书中另一种说法）
他跟着特拉普一起跑掉

options.en: He pretends he has an emergency dentist appointment
options.zh: 他假装自己有紧急的牙医预约

explain.en: To avoid going to Transratania with her, Geronimo says he must leave for an emergency dentist appointment.
explain.zh: 为了不被她拉去特兰鼠尼亚，杰罗尼摩说自己得马上去赴一个紧急的牙医预约。
